race.name: Tjejvasan
race.tagline: Thirty kilometers of sisterhood through the Dalarna wilderness — the world's largest women-only ski race, where 8,000 skiers share the same frozen trail that legends built.

vitals.registration: Opens in autumn; sells out quickly
vitals.aid_stations: Multiple feed stations with warm drinks, energy food, and blueberry soup

climate.description: Late February in Dalarna means deep cold with reliable snow cover. Temperatures typically range from -15°C to -5°C. The forested sections provide wind shelter but open lake crossings near Mora can be exposed. Daylight is returning but race start can still be frigid.
challenges: Sub-zero start temperatures in late February
Open lake crossings near Mora expose skiers to wind
Wax selection critical across temperature-variable terrain
Short daylight window for slower participants

course.primary: The second half of the iconic Vasaloppet trail, from Oxberg to Mora. Rolling forest terrain with gentle climbs and descents through birch and pine forests. The final kilometers cross open farmland before the historic finish in Mora.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks through forest and open terrain
features: Shares the final 30km of the legendary Vasaloppet course
Iconic finish arch in Mora with massive crowds
Rolling forest terrain with birch and pine
Powerful atmosphere of 8,000 women racing together

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum field size and community scores reflect the unmatched scale and atmosphere of the world's largest women-only ski race. Vasaloppet-grade organization and grooming anchor the logistics scores. Shorter distance limits overall score.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: Prestige 4 promotes one tier but cannot enter TIER 1 — confirmed TIER 2

history.summary: Founded in 1988 as a women-only complement to Vasaloppet, Tjejvasan covers the final 30 kilometers of the historic Vasaloppet trail from Oxberg to Mora. It has grown into the world's largest women-only ski race, with nearly 8,000 participants annually. The event is a cornerstone of Vasaloppet Winter Week and has become a powerful symbol of women's participation in Nordic skiing.
notable_facts: World's largest women-only cross-country ski race
Part of Vasaloppet Winter Week alongside Vasaloppet, Öppet Spår, and Halvvasan
Shares the final 30km of the Vasaloppet course, finishing in Mora
Founded in 1988 — over 35 years of continuous women's racing
Part of the Ski Classics Challengers series

videos.title: TjejeVasan
videos.description: Casey Wright, Ash Spittle and I competed in the TjejVasan at the end of Last February. it's a 30km classic races from Oxberg to Mora with 10000 female participants. I placed 65th in a time of 1:36:42, Casey placed 66th in a time of 1:37:12 and Ash placed 154th in a time of 1:45:26. This was our last hoorah at the end of a 4 month long European ski season before flying home to Australia.

videos.title: Vasaloppets vintervecka - På skidor i fäders spår
videos.description:
Under Vasaloppets vintervecka finns det åtta lopp att välja mellan. Det finns en utmaning för varje familjemedlem.

I veckans första lopp, Kortvasan, får alla från 12 år delta. Hela familjer skidar tillsammans de 30 kilometerna från Oxberg till Mora. Tjejvasan lockar såväl elit som motionär. Det är glädje, svett och gemenskap i en härlig kombination. I Ungdomsvasan får alla mellan nio och sexton år känna på hur det känns att åka in i Vasaloppsmålet till publikens jubel.

Öppet Spår är det perfekta loppet för dig som vill åka världens längsta skidlopp, men slippa tävlingsstress. Väljer du Halvvasan i år, väljer du kanske att åka 90 kilometer nästa år. I Halvvasan kan du också seeda sig till en bättre startgrupp i söndagens Vasalopp. Stafettvasan samlar företag, kompisgäng och familjer. Fem sträckor från Sälen till Mora - en upplevelse utöver det vanliga. I Barnens Vasalopp, i Sälen och Mora, skidar de allra minsta i fäders spår. Alla är vinnare och alla får medalj.

Störst och sist. Veckans höjdpunkt är Vasaloppet - det äldsta, längsta och största långloppet i världen. Det är 90 kilometer naturskön upplevelse tillika ett mandomsprov, kanske en av de största utmaningar du kan ta dig an. I fäders spår för framtids segrar!

videos.title: World's biggest race is in Sweden - Vasaloppet
videos.description:
Vasaloppet is the world's oldest long-distance ski race and also the one with the highest amount of participants. On the first Sunday in March, thousands of skiiers make the 90km (56 mile) race between the town of Sälen and Mora in the state of Dalarna. The origin comes from the Swedish rebellion who took down the Danish king and became king of Sweden in 1523. Aside from the Sunday race, there are also night races, tjejvasan for women and öppet spår (open track) during the week prior. The male and female winners gets a winning wreath from a kranskulla and a kransmas at the finish-line in Mora.

My channel is packed with Swedish tutorials and language challenges where you can learn everything from nouns and verbs to grammar and special Swedish words. I also talk about places in Sweden and where you as a tourist can visit. I have made youtube videos for over 10 years and 10 Swedish Words started with me explaining 10 Swedish words that don't exist in English. You can also find videos about Norse Mythology, my deep-talk series Good Talk and other info about Sweden and Swedish culture. 

Blog: http://www.theswedishlad.se
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/theswedishlad
Facebook: ‪http://www.facebook.com/MartinNotSven
Swedish channel: ‪‪https://www.youtube.com/c/martinarvebro
Instagram: TheSwedishLad
Instagram: TheSwedishLanguage

Intro graphics by Oliver Holmgren & Erica Svejderud.
Music is used with permission from Epidemic Sound.

#vasarace #vasaloppet

Cheers
-Martin in Sweden

videos.title: Ungdomsvasan 2018 Herrar - Starten i Hökberg
videos.description:
Starten för herrar -15 och -16 i Ungdomsvasan 2018. 

Välkommen in och kolla på vår livesändning - "Livet i Hökberg" på www.vasaloppet.tv

videos.title: Tjejvasan
videos.description:
Loppet är 30 km med bara kvinnor i startleden. Det finns både tävlingsklasser (senior och junior) och motionsklass. Stämningen är hög längs spåret som kantas av levande musik och roliga aktiviteter. Tjejvasan är en del av En Klassiker Tjej och en bra utmaning att ta sig an tillsammans med vännerna. Tjejvasan direktsänds varje år i Sveriges Television.
https://www.vasaloppet.se/lopp/skidlopp/tjejvasan/
